# Changelog

This page lists all PUM releases with their release notes, sourced from the
[GitHub releases](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases).


## [1.7.2](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/1.7.2) - 2026-05-12

### What's Changed
* Bump docker/build-push-action from 6 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in [#188](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/188)
* Bump docker/login-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in [#187](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/187)
* Bump actions/deploy-pages from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in [#186](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/186)
* Bump actions/upload-pages-artifact from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in [#189](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/189)
* fix injections + false positive leaks by @3nids in [#190](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/190)
* fix windows CI by @3nids in [#191](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/191)


**Full Changelog**: [1.7.1...1.7.2](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/compare/1.7.1...1.7.2)

## [1.3.0](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/1.3.0) - 2026-01-29

### What's Changed
* Add Upgrade capability by @3nids in [#149](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/149)
* rename hook to create/drop app by @3nids in [#150](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/150)
* compare schema migrations by @3nids in [#151](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/151)
* refine granting + add more tests by @3nids in [#152](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/152)
* Checker revival by @3nids in [#153](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/153)
* accept PG connection string by @3nids in [#154](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/154)
* dump/restore revival by @3nids in [#155](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/155)
* allow to define uninstall steps by @3nids in [#156](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/156)
* handle consecutive imports by @3nids in [#157](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/157)
* add feedback to get progression and allow to cancel install/upgrade + fix imports again + fix parameters by @3nids in [#158](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/158)
* Improve feeback by @3nids in [#159](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/159)


**Full Changelog**: [1.2.3...1.3.0](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/compare/1.2.3...1.3.0)

## [0.10.0](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.10.0) - 2022-08-12

### What's Changed
* ⚠️ **MAJOR CHANGE** ⚠️ use file name instead of checksum to check whether a migration was run by @olivierdalang in [#81](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/81)
* fix : do not ignore trigger on views by @olivierdalang in [#100](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/100)
* make check honor --exclude-schema for indexes, constraints, sequences and triggers too by @olivierdalang in [#102](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/102)
* verbose output for pum test-and-upgrade on CI by @olivierdalang in [#91](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/91)
* show trace on exception in upgrade (when verbose flag is set) by @olivierdalang in [#101](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/pull/101)

**Full Changelog**: [0.9.14...0.10.0](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/compare/0.9.14...0.10.0)

## [0.9.14](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.9.14) - 2021-05-27

Fixes :

- `pum --version` returning [DEV] instead of actual version

## [0.9.13](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.9.13) - 2021-05-27

Fixes :

- pum check ignoring parameter-less function

- pum check returning false positives on triggers

- more readable output of pum check

Fix ordering of deltas by name.

## [0.7.0](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.7.0) - 2018-04-24

New arguments for upgrades:
-v for variables to be used in SQL deltas
-u for maximum version to run the deltas up to

## [0.5.13](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.5.13) - 2018-03-26

Execute the pre scripts in reverse order. Assuming that the list of delta dirs is [delta1, delta2] it means that the pre scripts of delta2 are executed before the pre scripts of delta1.

## [0.5.12](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.5.12) - 2018-03-23

Instead of having DeltaPy.delta_dir return the first delta dir in the list let's return the delta_dir into which the delta file is actually stored. This is much more useful to DeltaPy subclasses.

## [0.5.10](https://github.com/opengisch/pum/releases/tag/0.5.10) - 2018-02-21

- Add output_file option to `pum check` command
- Sort deltas by name within groups
